title: RSW Christmas 21 Piece Ribbon & Bow Set – 18 Gold & Silver Kraft Eco-Friendly Bows and 3 x 7m Raffia Ribbons – Festive Gift Wrapping Accessory Pack
features: COMPLETE GIFT WRAP SET – Includes 18 gold and silver bows and 3 rolls of raffia ribbon (7m each) for a coordinated look
ELEGANT METALLIC COLOURS – Perfect for adding a luxury finish to festive presents, hampers, or corporate gifts
ECO-FRIENDLY MATERIAL – Made from kraft paper for a recyclable and sustainable wrapping option
VERSATILE USE – Suitable for gift wrapping, party favours, and DIY Christmas crafts
EASY TO USE – Pre-made bows and generous ribbon lengths make wrapping quick and stylish
description: Create beautifully coordinated gifts this festive season with the RSW 21 Piece Ribbon & Bow Set in gold and silver. This premium set includes eighteen pre-made bows in two elegant metallic-inspired tones, plus three rolls of raffia ribbon, each measuring approximately 7 metres. It’s the perfect choice for adding a touch of glamour and sophistication to your Christmas presents. Crafted from eco-friendly kraft paper, this set offers a sustainable alternative to plastic ribbons and bows, helping you stay stylish while reducing environmental impact. The bows are easy to attach to gifts, while the raffia ribbons can be curled, tied, or layered to achieve your desired look. Ideal for wrapping Christmas gifts, decorating festive hampers, or finishing off corporate presents, this versatile set allows you to create professional-looking gift presentations with minimal effort. Pair with matching wrapping paper or gift bags for a cohesive gold and silver theme under your Christmas tree.
